feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Only The Beginning
entry.summary:
Author: Zarha24

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,167Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 2

Summary: “I’m sorry-” Derek begins before he’s interrupted by a growl from Erica and very few words from Stiles. “Don’t you dare.” It’s cold and empty, gaining whines from all the betas even Peter oddly enough. “Get out if you're going to apologize, I don't need it because to me they're all empty no matter how true they may be.” It’s still cold but with a deep sadness rather than anger. “I want you.” Derek spoke softly as Stiles seemed to freeze. “In the pack with me, with us. Please?” He sounded desperate and like a man lost to his yearning. “And my pups? They are wanted too?” He needs to be sure because he’d only join for their sake and no one else. “Yes, they are wanted. Can you please look at me?” Derek sounds needy by this point, definitely not his usual alpha tone or even body language Stiles finds as he finally looks at the man. “Alright, fine.” He agrees, with a softer, more gentle tone that speaks volumes for how he feels.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Yellow Paper Daisy
entry.summary:
Author: Babysterek

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 77,487Chapters: 23/25Kudos: 155

Summary: “Well,” Peter says at last, forcing a crooked smile into his voice, “at least this time he didn’t almost get us all killed.”Derek swallows. His throat is dry, the words scraping on the way out. “I was drunk.” They land and disappear without effect.Talia turns then, her gaze settling on him fully. It’s steady, unreadable, and it makes his shoulders tense despite himself. “You were careless,” she says. “You are a werewolf, and if you got drunk, you laced it with wolfsbane, you did it. Do you understand, In twenty-four years, every scandal has had the same root. You. At some point, it stops being bad luck and becomes character. And I am tired of pretending this is something that merely happens to you.”---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------Derek just wanted a moment of quiet. Instead, he crosses a line with the last person he should trust.....old grudges, bad decisions and a mistake he keeps repeating. "He learned the shape of the poison once,from a woman who wore it like skin.Now hemlock blooms in his own hands,and he cannot tell where she ends and he begins. "

entry.title: Run Boy Run
entry.summary:
Author: myswordhandissinging

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,211Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 816

Summary: Stiles Stilinski knew he should have stayed in to finish his assignment that was due on Monday. Instead, he had to go investigate with the pack. He knew he was going to regret it later, and he probably should have listened to his instincts. When he goes missing, the pack finds him in the same spot after days of searching.   Or the one where Stiles goes missing for a couple of days and comes back blind and with magical powers. What did that bitch do to him?   *This was first published in 2013 as a teenager. Now, as an adult with a developed frontal lobe, the age difference between Derek and Stiles is only 2 years, with Stiles as an 18-year-old high school senior and Derek being 20-years-old.

entry.title: Eyes Of The Alpha
entry.summary:
Author: Ash20091990

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,005Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 117

Summary: Derek wants to make a wish to bring back everyone the pack has lost. His soul is calling for him to fix it. He now has to figure out how to be a good Alpha and learn to do it blind.

entry.title: Neal's Therapist
entry.summary:
Author: Tankeika

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 44,678Chapters: 7/8Kudos: 12

Summary: Neal Caffrey is picked up from prison by Peter to begin their work together. It goes well, at first. Until a few weeks in when Neal makes a run for it for the first time, cutting his anklet, unknowingly giving the now divorced, Peter Burke, the perfect opportunity to finally enact his long awaited plan. For those here for the Derek/Stiles tag, they're not in the story yet, but I promise, they will be, and I will put it in the chapter notes when they're introduced. It will be worth it, so if you're here for that, I appreciate your patience!!!

entry.title: Dying In Love
entry.summary:
Author: amatorial

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,144Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 72

Summary: After dropping out of his FBI internship, Stiles returned to Beacon Hills, struggling to outgrow the version of himself high school forced him to become. He wasn't sure what he was doing with his life, but he kept busy among the shelves at The Reading Nook, letting the quiet and routine distract him from the memories. And then Derek Hale walked in. Derek being in his life again stirred a hunger inside Stiles, a wanting that consumed him whole. It left him breathless, filled with a love so fierce it clawed at his chest and threatened to tear him apart inside.

entry.title: La-la-La Liberated
entry.summary:
Author: Definitively_Different_Drivel

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,194Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 43

Summary: Stiles still seemed confused. "I don't get why you look so upset. I thought you'd be happy." "Happy." Derek bit out. "Yeah. You can stick around again. No more smelling shitty pinning Stiles. No more pack meetings where I make everything awkward. No more, you know, clumsy asinine attempts at flirting and friendship. No more dancing around the elephant in the room. The elephant has officially been put down. Dead and buried. No more elephants." Derek swallowed hard. "What if I told you I didn't actually dislike that elephant?" "I wouldn't believe you. Look, I get it if this hurts your ego, but you gotta get over yourself. Look on the sunny side of life, you know?" In which an accidental blood offering to the fae results in a boon that removes all those pesky emotions regarding Derek. The boon is permanent unless removed before Stiles falls in love again. With a strange suitor sucking up Stiles' attention, will Derek solve the puzzle in time, or will Stiles fall in love and forever be incapable of feeling when Derek is on his mind?

entry.title: Looking for a Cure
entry.summary:
Author: Littleplutodefender

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 981Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 56

Summary: “It’s not my fault you got kidnapped, sti-” His voice lacks any conviction, but I cut him off nonetheless. I’d like to say I didn’t let my anger get the best of me, but I practically growl when I cut him off.“I was stabbed ten times, Scott. Ten goddamn times. Do you know how long it takes to stab someone ten times?”---Stiles got kidnapped and Scott wasn't there to save him.

entry.title: all the things we didn't say (all the answers i wish i gave you)
entry.summary:
Author: prettea

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,884Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 18

Summary: "It was almost impressive how much blood the human body contained—five to six liters, according to his biology textbook. Roughly the same amount needed to fill a scooter’s gas tank. Stiles hazily wondered if Derek would reach out. The teen felt his hand slip from where it had been pressed against his side. He couldn’t tell whether it was the blood making his grip too slick, or if his strength was simply giving out. Stiles egoistically hoped Derek would come to his funeral." or: Stiles gets hurt. Badly. or: Derek is worried, and like the responsible adult he is, he ignores it.

entry.title: song of the phoenix
entry.summary:
Author: graveltotempo

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 220,378Chapters: 55/60Kudos: 6,822

Summary: In a last ditch effort to save Beacon Hills after everyone else has died, Stiles channels all of his energy and magic into cleansing the Nemeton and the magical core of the town. But he is more powerful than he knows, more connected to the Nemeton than anyone can guess, and a group of kids, teenagers and adults wakes up in the middle of the night ten years earlier with a second chance they didn't know they needed and a bond they don't understand. Stiles though? Stiles wakes up with a little more.

entry.title: Peel Back What's Underneath
entry.summary:
Author: ohnonotanothersterekfic (badbadnotgoodporn)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,393Chapters: 1/18Kudos: 25

Summary: After accidentally killing a classmate with powers he doesn't understand, Stiles runs away to North Carolina, trying to build a new life. Six years later, after a war is declared against supernaturals, Stiles is trafficked back to California to be sold to military governor Gerard Argent. He'd tried so hard to stay out of the civil war back east but when he's rescued by a pack of werewolves, picking a side to fight for is a lot easier. Jaded and war-torn, Derek struggles to keep up as Laura's right hand in the Hale Pack while they fight alongside the resistance. Anger and vengeance only keep a man motivated for so long, but then he's tasked with rescuing a smart-mouthed, brilliant, and beautiful spark who's far more powerful than he lets on. Suddenly Derek has a lot more to lose in the war than just his life. The last place either of them expected to find love was in the middle of a battlefield.

entry.title: For the Moon Goddess
entry.summary:
Author: ProLuna

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 63,881Chapters: 36/42Kudos: 117

Summary: Stiles is a new novice at the Beacon Hills Temple of the Moon Goddess, where the priests have forsworn all women and have ritual sex to make seminal offerings to their deity. In an AU where a moon cult is the dominant religion in an alternate fantasy-type world, Stiles navigates friendship, love, and a confusing priesthood that has way too many rules about sex for basically being Sex University.A lot of other pairings along the way, but from the beginning, this story is about how we get to Sterek.

entry.title: Distortion
entry.summary:
Author: Hellbreaker42

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,414Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 29

Summary: Claudia Stilinski's last words were a riddle spoken in Latin. Her husband is destroying himself trying to solve it. Her son is leaving voicemails that end the same way every time: "I love you, Dad. I miss you, but I understand."When a move to Beacon Hills promises a fresh start, neither of them expects what's waiting — least of all Stiles, who has no idea that his mother's final words weren't madness...They were a warning.

entry.title: Growing Sideways
entry.summary:
Author: dandeliondick

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,950Chapters: 2/3Kudos: 43

Summary: He had wished he had some way to contact Derek. He used to send him emails every week during the hunt. He sent one every month that first year, but after a while it just slipped his mind, raising a kid and running a pack taking up his time instead of an outbox of unanswered emails. He doubted that Derek would ever come back, Beacon Hills had caused him nothing but pain since he was just a kid. He just wished he could meet Luke. He wanted him to see how strong and how good he was even after all of that. He wanted Derek to see Luke’s beta form and that his Blue eyes are a symbol of just how much he has survived. That everyday he sees Erica’s fire and Boyd’s steadiness in how Luke plays and talks. Maybe he wanted to show Derek that Beacon Hills was somewhere worth coming back to now, that it was a home now.-In blue ink, 54 W Beacon Preserve Dr, Beacon Hills. Derek didn’t take the napkin, he already knew the address by heart since Talia made him memorize it and the house phone number before the first day of kindergarten. The Hale house.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: A Flower Made Of Iron
entry.summary:
Author: XOLissy

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,433,820Chapters: 43/?Kudos: 64

Summary: Eden Parker has learned how to survive by staying soft in a world that punishes it. Adopted young, raised in the quiet fractures of Mystic Falls, and carrying truths no one else can see, Eden moves through life balancing grief, loyalty, and a dangerous kind of hope. He loves deeply. He trusts carefully. And he has no idea how many forces—human and otherwise—are already watching him. When new friendships form, old wounds reopen, and the supernatural begins to bleed into the ordinary, Eden finds himself at the center of something far larger than a high-school existence should allow. Monsters lurk in forests and shadows. Love arrives when it shouldn’t. Protection becomes complicated. And the past—buried, sealed, and forgotten—refuses to stay quiet. Some bonds are chosen. Some are fated. And some are forged in pain, blood, and devotion. Disclaimer: I do not own the Vampire Diaries, Supernatural, Teen Wolf, Smallville, or The Originals. I do not own any of the characters besides Eden Parker and Ben Monroe. All rights reserved to the writers.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Love Is In The Air
entry.summary:
Author: L0N3W0LF

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,261Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 29

Summary: Stiles is driving up a winding road through the Beacon Hills National Forest. Nothing but mountains and trees in every direction. The plan is to fish, drink beer and bust a few loads. It was a long work week and Stiles needs to unwind the best way he knows how. Or the one where Derek is a forest ranger and catches Stiles skinny dipping in the creek.

entry.title: too much of everything gets too much for me
entry.summary:
Author: sparassiss

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,746Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 31

Summary: “What’s going on?” Derek asks softly, seeing straight through Stiles, and Stiles knows this, lets out a huge sigh.  “I should save this for therapy,” Stiles grumbles, and it’s obvious now. He feels like a burden to Derek, to those around him. Doesn’t want to overwhelm them. Doesn’t think he’s worthy of their time, of their energy. “You know you can tell me anything,” Derek presses. When he meets Stiles’ maple eyes, he’s shocked by the sadness in them. How did he miss Stiles feeling like this? How long has he been feeling like this?

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Rake
entry.summary:
Author: Vampire_Finch

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 32,287Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 139

Summary: Au Regency Romance 1820 England. Explicit M/M sex scenes. Viscount Derek Hale has a notorious reputation as a dallier, a trifler, a breaker of Omega hearts and tarnisher of reputatiions, yet devishly handsome, charming and good -natured he is adored by London society. He is the type of aristocratic Alpha young Omega dabeutantes are warned to avoid at all costs. Stiles Stilinski is the 16 year old Omega son of Baron Noah Stilinski and his wife, Claudia. Taken to London for his debut into The Season and make a 'perfect match', Stiles is strenuously warned against any association with Viscount Hale by his cousin and Mother. Accepted into The Ton, Stiles inevitably meets Viscount Hale and more than sparks fly. Can Stiles preserve his and his family's reputation and tame a wild heart or become another notch on the Viscount's bedpost?
